subcodes.first_line: God hath pronounced in the Qur'án: "Let not thy hand be tied to thy neck, nor yet open it with all openness," and He saith: "But seek thou a middle course between these twain." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدا در قرآن می‌فرمايد لا تجعل يدک مغلولة الی عنقک و لا تبسطها کلّ البسط و می‌فرمايد و ابتغ بين ذلک سبيلا
subcodes.subjects: @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
